title: parse_sapling_address ignores ZcashNetwork; cross-network Sapling addresses silently accepted
description: tx_builder.rs::parse_sapling_address takes no ZcashNetwork parameter. SaplingExtractor::try_from_sapling ignores the _net argument (prefixed with underscore). A mainnet zs1... address supplied to a testnet wallet (or vice versa) is accepted without error, producing a transaction the node will reject at broadcast. The network parameter present in build_shielded_tx is never threaded into the address parser. The ConversionError::IncorrectNetwork arm exists in the match but can never be triggered.
